XVOICE_VOICE_PROPERTIES

Stores information that the title uses to perform lip synchronization for the graphical representation of a voice-chat user.

typedef struct{
    FLOAT fGain;
    FLOAT fPrediction[12];
    FLOAT fReflection[12];
    LARGE_INTEGER liTimestamp;
} XVOICE_VOICE_PROPERTIES, *LPXVOICE_VOICE_PROPERTIES;

Members

fGain
The fGain scalar is related to the gain term associated with the linear prediction coefficients and correlates with the amplitude of the signal. A speech waveform's amplitude is an important determinant in the overall perceived loudness of the sound.
fPrediction
The fPrediction vector contains linear prediction coefficients. As its name implies, linear prediction is frequently employed to predict samples of a signal using a linear combination of previous samples. Linear prediction coefficients are typically calculated by minimizing the error between the predicted signal and the actual signal. The spectral envelope (and therefore spectral shape) of the speech signal can be represented using linear prediction coefficients.
fReflection
The fReflection vector contains an alternative representation of the linear prediction coefficients. Reflection coefficients are computed directly from the linear prediction coefficients using backward recursion. Reflection coefficients are guaranteed to be stable at all times throughout successive frames of speech.
liTimestamp
Specifies a timestamp associated with this set of voice property values.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xvoice.h.

See Also

Xbox Live Structures | IXVoiceDecoder::GetVoiceProperties
